subtasks.title: Harden general file upload storage against path traversal and overwrite
subtasks.instructions: Add a server-only upload storage helper and make the route persist bytes only through it. Generate full opaque UUID upload directories and storage basenames; optionally retain only a strictly allowlisted short ASCII alphanumeric extension. Never use the client basename as a path. Before writing, resolve the candidate and require it to be a strict child of the new upload directory; create directories 0700 and files 0600 with exclusive wx semantics and bounded collision retries. Preserve response {name,path,size}, size/quota/retention, and old upload cleanup compatibility. Harden cleanup to use lstat and skip symlink entries. Return a fixed path-free failure. Add isolated temp-root tests for traversal, absolute paths, collision, permissions, symlinks, compatibility and outside sentinels.
acceptance: Client filenames cannot affect paths outside the strict optional extension allowlist
API shape and limits remain compatible

subtasks.title: Enforce GitHub OAuth upstream deadline with caller cancellation and body cleanup
subtasks.instructions: Always create and compose a 15-second internal deadline with the optional caller signal without depending on AbortSignal.any. Track the first abort source, pass the combined signal to fetch, race bounded reader.read calls, cancel/release readers, and dispose timers/listeners. Map only deadline expiry to github_timeout; preserve caller cancellation. Keep fixed endpoints, redirects, 64 KiB cap, stable codes and secret-safe errors. Add a resettable test timeout and hang/cancel/cleanup regressions.
acceptance: All three GitHub calls retain deadline with caller signal

subtasks.title: Parse bounded MP4 metadata when moov is located after large media payloads
subtasks.instructions: Traverse top-level MP4 boxes across the full buffer by validated declared sizes and jump over payloads. Parse only a real top-level moov under an 8 MiB metadata budget, depth 6 and one global 2048-box budget. Preserve encrypted rejection and numeric metadata. Do not raw-search or add ffprobe. Add real MP4 fixtures with free padding before moov around/after 8 MiB plus false-positive and malformed/budget tests. Preserve current size confirmation/hard ceilings and duration/resolution policy.
acceptance: No public contract or process dependency changes

subtasks.title: Integrate contracts and align upload, Links, and Appearance documentation
subtasks.instructions: Document upload containment, GitHub 15-second composed deadline through body read, and MP4 full top-level header-chain with bounded metadata. Correct related stale Appearance limits to current source. Do not change AGENTS or add UI docs/prototype. Search all consumers for contract drift.

subtasks.title: Run integrated validation and checker security review
subtasks.instructions: Install dependencies if absent; run focused tests, lint, tsc and smoke checks. Review upload escape/overwrite/symlink boundaries, OAuth abort classification/resource cleanup, MP4 false-positive/budgets, API compatibility, docs and scope. Report blockers exactly and do not commit, push or merge.
acceptance: lint/tsc pass or unrelated failures are isolated
